findings.description: Section s2 is missing PascalCase class names that appear in its Action code examples: `SqlResultSet` (used in doRW11AC0301 to hold query results) and `CM311AC1Component` (used to execute DB lookups). Both are referenced by name in the source and could be search terms an AI would use to locate this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source doRW11AC0301: `SqlResultSet sysAcct = comp.selectSystemAccount(userId); SqlResultSet users = comp.selectUsers(userId); ... CM311AC1Component comp = new CM311AC1Component();`
